title: Prompt Engineering lesson 1: Prompt framing
description: Apply a practical prompt framing workflow to improve quality, reduce rework, and make your AI-assisted work easier to scale.
summary: This lesson teaches a concise, production-ready approach for prompt framing that can be used in real team settings, from documentation and planning to evaluation and iteration.
keyTakeaways: Frame the problem before you generate output.
Use evidence and constraints to improve quality.
Turn the result into a repeatable workflow.

quiz.question: Which habit improves the quality of your prompt framing workflow most?
options: Start with an explicit objective and constraints
Skip examples and write immediately
Let the model decide the structure
Avoid reviewing outputs
quiz.explanation: Clear goals and constraints create stronger outputs and help you evaluate results faster.
